atoms.label: Actions
atoms.description: Hero CTA actions: button stack / email input + button / Monthly-Annual tabs (3 types × 2 devices).

atoms.label: Additional
atoms.description: Sidebar inline divider, caption, button stack, or label row.

atoms.label: Additional Content
atoms.description: Card-content additions: divider, label, caption, button, double button, search input, tags, segmented (8 sub-shapes, 320 wide).

atoms.label: Additional Meta
atoms.description: Compact meta indicators: button groups, badges, text, divider, input, tab menu, avatar, icon, rating, pagination, empty (12 sub-shapes, 320 wide).

atoms.label: Badge
atoms.description: Compact status indicator.

atoms.label: Button
atoms.description: Trigger an action with multiple variants and sizes.

atoms.label: Cell
atoms.description: Sidebar row group; expandable header with indented children.

atoms.label: Cell Item
atoms.description: Single sidebar navigation row with state, active, and indent variants.

atoms.label: Checkbox
atoms.description: Two- or three-state checkable input.

atoms.label: CheckboxLabel
atoms.description: Checkbox composed with a text label.

atoms.label: Icons
atoms.description: Tree-shakable React icon set (2,278 icons, line + fill variants).

atoms.label: Info Card
atoms.description: Sidebar bottom announcement / upgrade card (lg warning, sm trial+progress).

atoms.label: Input
atoms.description: Single-line text input field.

atoms.label: Progress Bar
atoms.description: Linear progress indicator.

atoms.label: Progress Circle
atoms.description: Circular progress indicator.

atoms.label: Radio
atoms.description: Single-select radio input.

atoms.label: RadioLabel
atoms.description: Radio composed with a text label.

atoms.label: Tail Icon
atoms.description: Action icon affordance attached to sidebar rows (sm/lg, default/hover/disabled).

atoms.label: Text Blocks
atoms.description: Horizontal stack of equal-width text blocks (dot + title + label, 1-5 blocks).

atoms.label: Text Container
atoms.description: Headline + description + caption text block (7 sizes × 2 aligns).

atoms.label: Text Rows
atoms.description: Vertical stack of title-content rows with dotted divider (up to 10).

atoms.label: Toggle
atoms.description: Binary on/off switch.

atoms.label: Tooltip
atoms.description: Floating contextual hint on hover.

atoms.label: User
atoms.description: Sidebar user row (avatar, name, handle, optional Pro badge, tail icons).

molecules.label: Bottom
molecules.description: Sidebar bottom region: InfoCard + cells + user.

molecules.label: Dropdown
molecules.description: Menu of selectable items triggered by a button.

molecules.label: Middle
molecules.description: Sidebar middle region: caption-headed cell groups (1-4 blocks).

molecules.label: Search Input
molecules.description: Input with a search icon affordance.

molecules.label: Sidebar
molecules.description: Full sidebar (Top + Middle + Bottom), 280×1024, fill toggle.

molecules.label: Table Cell
molecules.description: Single body cell for tabular data.

molecules.label: Top
molecules.description: Sidebar top region: user + divider + caption (+ optional buttons/label).

organisms.label: Page Header
organisms.description: Page header with back arrow, headline, description, and top + bottom action rows (800 wide).
